steps.name: local-bridge-session-protocol
steps.summary: Added a pure agent-design-engine transaction protocol over existing canvas-core operations and a loopback-only Node bridge with ephemeral token auth, project path confinement, guarded revision/hash commits, monotonic event cursors, bounded replay, cursor-gap snapshot recovery, HTTP snapshots/transactions, and WebSocket broadcasts. Verified engine 5/5, bridge 5/5, and both TypeScript builds.
